en.name: Connect Four
en.desc: Drop discs to connect four in a row! Strategic gameplay as you block your opponent while building your own winning line. A classic family favorite!
en.description: Connect Four is the classic two-player strategy game that has brought families together for generations! Drop colored discs into a vertical grid, watching them fall to the lowest available position. The goal is simple—be the first to connect four of your discs in a row, horizontally, vertically, or diagonally. But with each move, you must balance building your own winning line while blocking your opponent's threats!
en.objectives: Be the first player to connect four of your colored discs in a row—horizontally, vertically, or diagonally. Block your opponent's attempts while strategically positioning your own discs. Plan several moves ahead to create winning opportunities!
en.howToPlay: Click a column to drop your disc. Discs fall to the lowest available position. First player to connect four in a row wins. Block your opponent while building your own line!

rules.controls: Click on any column to drop your disc into that column. The disc will fall to the lowest empty position. Players alternate turns, with Red typically going first.
mechanics: Four in a row wins (any direction)
features: Two-Player Mode - Play against a friend

tips: Control the center column when possible
Look for "double threats" - two ways to win
Build from the bottom up strategically

faq.question: What's the best first move?
faq.answer: The center column is the strongest opening because it provides the most winning possibilities. A disc in the center can be part of horizontal, vertical, and diagonal wins in both directions.

faq.question: What is a double threat?
faq.answer: A double threat (or fork) is when you create two possible ways to win simultaneously. Your opponent can only block one, guaranteeing your victory on the next move.

faq.question: Can Connect Four always be won?
faq.answer: With perfect play from both players, the first player (Red) can always force a win on a standard 7x6 board. However, achieving perfect play requires significant skill!

faq.question: How do I recognize winning patterns?
faq.answer: Look for three in a row with open ends, or two pairs that could connect. Also watch for diagonal patterns—they're harder to spot than horizontal or vertical ones.

zh.name: 四子棋
zh.desc: 投放圆盘连成四子！在阻止对手的同时建立自己的获胜连线。经典家庭游戏首选！
zh.description: 四子棋是几代人以来凝聚家庭的经典双人策略游戏！将彩色圆盘投入垂直网格，看着它们落到最低可用位置。目标很简单——成为第一个将四个圆盘连成一线的玩家，水平、垂直或对角线均可。但每一步，你必须平衡建立自己的获胜线，同时阻止对手的威胁！
zh.objectives: 成为第一个将四个彩色圆盘连成一线的玩家——水平、垂直或对角线。在策略性定位自己圆盘的同时阻止对手的尝试。提前计划几步来创造获胜机会！
zh.howToPlay: 点击一列放下圆盘。圆盘会落到最低的可用位置。首先连成四个的玩家获胜。在建立自己的连线时阻止对手！

rules.controls: 点击任何列将圆盘投入该列。圆盘会落到最低的空位。玩家轮流进行，红方通常先走。
mechanics: 四个连成一线获胜（任何方向）
features: 双人对战模式 - 与朋友一起玩
深度策略 - 复杂决策

tips: 寻找"双重威胁"——两种获胜方式
尽早阻止对手的潜在连线
从底部向上策略性地构建

faq.question: 最佳的第一步是什么？
faq.answer: 中心列是最强的开局，因为它提供最多的获胜可能性。中心的圆盘可以是两个方向的水平、垂直和对角线胜利的一部分。

faq.question: 什么是双重威胁？
faq.answer: 双重威胁（或叉子）是你同时创造两种获胜方式。你的对手只能阻止一个，保证你在下一步获胜。

faq.question: 四子棋总是能赢吗？
faq.answer: 如果双方都完美发挥，先手（红方）在标准的7x6棋盘上总是能强迫获胜。然而，达到完美发挥需要相当大的技巧！

faq.question: 如何识别获胜模式？
faq.answer: 寻找两端开放的三连，或可以连接的两对。也要注意对角线模式——它们比水平或垂直的更难发现。
